3/22/2026
The run button on boa_app.py works.  The project exists in personal bitbucket repo.

(.venv) PS C:\Users\dgrad\_repos\BankOfAmerica\src> & c:\Users\dgrad\_repos\BankOfAmerica\.venv\Scripts\python.exe c:/Users/dgrad/_repos/BankOfAmerica/src/boa_app.py
2026-03-22 19:34:06,041 - INFO - __main__ - Flask application starting up...
2026-03-22 19:34:06,046 - INFO - __main__ - Running Flask app in development mode.
 * Serving Flask app 'boa_app'
 * Debug mode: on
2026-03-22 19:34:06,245 - INFO - werkzeug - WARNING: This is a development server. Do not use it in a production deployment. Use a production WSGI server instead.
 * Running on all addresses (0.0.0.0)
 * Running on http://127.0.0.1:5000
 * Running on http://192.168.0.154:5000

Statements go through July 2025.

need to check requirements.txt to see what's allowed at MEDITECH.

Last Greeley's oil fill - October 2024.  I need to add a way of categorizing and adding notes to transactions.

Statements are only viewable when on a specific statement type.


# You already did these steps:
python -m venv .venv
.venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1

# Install dependencies:
pip install -r requirements.txt

# Run your app:
python src/boa_app.py

# When done, deactivate:
deactivate

# Just delete the folder:
Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .venv
